Engine.description: Agentic coding engine that produced an artifact.
Engine.title: Engine

RetrievalCall.description:
One tool invocation harvested from the engine's own transcript.

Captured by the harness from the engine log — never the agent's word — so
the evaluator's leakage grading can see what a cell actually
retrieved. Long parameters and results are digested, not stored: the log
is an audit trail, not a content mirror.

params_digest.description: SHA-256 (hex, 16 chars) of the full serialized params
params_digest.title: Params Digest

query.description: The human-legible query/params slice (truncated), where extractable
query.title: Query

result_digest.description: SHA-256 (hex, 16 chars) of the logged result payload
result_digest.title: Result Digest

retrieved_doc_date.description: A document/decision date parsed from the result, where one is legible — the leakage grading's timing signal
retrieved_doc_date.title: Retrieved Doc Date

timestamp.description: Engine-logged wall-clock time of the call, verbatim
timestamp.title: Timestamp

tool.description: Tool name as the engine logged it, e.g. mcp__courtlistener__search
tool.title: Tool

RetrievalCall.title: RetrievalCall

UsageRole.description: Which agentic stage a usage record belongs to.
UsageRole.title: UsageRole

description:
``retrieval_log.json`` — the cell's tool-call transcript, harness-captured.

Rides to the collect job with the cell's output exactly as ``usage.json``
does. Under the leakage doctrine, timing is the control: replay cells run
with the same tools as forward cells, and this log (plus the cross-evaluator's
leakage grading over it) replaces walls. ``mcp_servers`` snapshots the pinned tool
manifest the cell was configured with — the pipeline-attribution record.

actor_id.description: The predictor/evaluator id whose cell this was
actor_id.title: Actor Id

calls.description: Tool invocations in transcript order (500 caps a runaway cell)
calls.title: Calls

mcp_servers.description: Pinned manifest entries the cell was configured with (id==version strings)
mcp_servers.title: Mcp Servers

mode.description: The cell's provisioned mode: forward | replay; None on records written before the mode field existed
mode.title: Mode

title: RetrievalLog
